top_candidates.reasoning: The structural contrast 'one resolved buddhi' vs 'many-branched intelligences of the irresolute' — phrased as 'one settled intellect anchored in actual customer-impact data' vs 'many-branched mind whose proliferation is itself the symptom that prior grounding work was skipped' — is the exact rhetorical signature of vyavasāyātmikā buddhir ekā / bahu-śākhā ... avyavasāyinām. The vocative addressing-the-resolute-aspirant ('staff engineer who has reached the migration plan') mirrors kuru-nandana.

2.39 also opens the buddhi-yoga gateway but speaks about karma-bandha-prahāsyasi (you will be released from the bondage of action) — the engineering layer's anchor on 'proliferation as diagnostic' is more specific to 2.41's contrast structure.
6.36 also speaks of unresolved mind being incapable of yoga, but it lacks the 'many-branched vs one' contrast structure; it speaks instead of the unrestrained mind.
